summary:
A patient presenting post-trauma with decreased breath sounds on the left and tracheal deviatioin to the right indicates unilateral lung collapse from pneumothorax or pulmonary collapse; closed drainage remains the recommended primary therapeutic approach aligned with established clinical guidelines for managing such injuries.  

Answer:

\boxed{\text{C}}
